case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. ERIC ARMANDO ANAYA

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00) SERVED SEP-16-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ANAYA, ERIC ARMANDO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ANAYA, ERIC ARMANDO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-21-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ANGEL GARCIA, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-21-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-11-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ERIC ARMANANDO ANAYA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
